_doc: M15 run config for a 250-500 task bounded Agents-A1 shadow workload against the ALREADY-SERVED llama-swap endpoint on fred. PLACEHOLDER, no secrets. The agent CALLS this endpoint; it never serves models.

endpoint._model_doc: llama-swap serves InternScience/Agents-A1-Q8_0-GGUF on fred's dual 3090s. GGUF chat = output text only, no router logits -> telemetry_missing=true + policy=null; features never fabricated.

task_sources._doc: PUBLIC 261-task M15 batch (8 category types incl numeric + explain-rubric).

batch._doc: Bounded larger run. size caps this run; cap is the hard maximum this config permits.

verifiers._doc: Reuse the verifier toggles. self_consistency_samples=1 -> one call per task (bounds the run); self-consistency skipped at n<2.

escalation._doc: Reuse thresholds. Advisory only; never sets a human outcome.

resume._doc: Resume/retry-safe: on re-run, prompt_ids already in the run log are skipped; only missing tasks appended.

run._doc: deterministic=true -> placeholder timestamps for reproducible committed samples. mode dry-run needs no network; the M15 live run injects a capped live model_fn against the running agents-a1 endpoint.
run._paths_doc: All default outputs are under the gitignored private dir -- raw task/output text stays local. Commit only aggregate-only artifacts.
